prompt: A clean, minimalist anime illustration of a melancholic young woman in three-quarter profile, seated and resting her cheek against one hand. She has long straight blue-black hair with blunt bangs, very pale skin, and soft gray-blue eyes with a distant, tired expression. Her face is small and delicate, with a tiny beauty mark under one eye and subtle lashes. She wears a dark oversized layered outfit in deep navy and charcoal: a high-neck black top under a loose draped jacket or kimono-like outer layer, with faint gold line accents and tiny eye motifs worked into the fabric. Her accessories are occult-inspired and elegant: multiple ear piercings, one long dangling earring shaped like an eye with a teardrop pendant, a thin necklace with a small eye charm, and several rings including an eye ring on the hand touching her face. Her nails are painted muted slate blue. The background is a flat warm off-white with a carefully arranged gallery of mystical eye symbols and hanging ornaments. Include exactly 6 eye-themed wall elements: 1 framed eye picture in the upper left, 1 circular eye ornament hanging below it, 1 small circle target-like ornament near the upper right, 1 black hanging charm with an eye and geometric crystals on the far right, 1 square panel with a radiant eye at mid-right, and 1 dark rectangular panel with an eye and 4 teardrop shapes at the lower right. Add a dark bottle silhouette and a few muted blue-gray leaves on the left side as secondary decor. Use a restrained palette of navy, black, cream, gray-blue, and touches of muted gold. The composition should feel quiet, gothic, feminine, and introspective, with flat graphic shapes, crisp linework, little shading, and a modern decorative poster aesthetic.
